about: I'm Anay Garodia — freshman at Columbia studying Mathematics and Computer Science, Class of 2029. From Kolkata. I do AI safety research at the ARiSE Lab and facilitate the CAIAC Intro Technical Fellowship. This summer I'm a Laidlaw Scholar working on AI safety research. Once a week I teach math to elementary school kids in Harlem.

github_repos.name: mcpaudit
github_repos.description: Static analysis scanner for MCP server security. Detects shell injection, prompt injection, hardcoded secrets, path traversal, and 8 other vulnerability classes using Python's ast module. Published on PyPI as mcp-vulnscan.

github_repos.name: yhack-bridge
github_repos.description: Real-time bidirectional ASL ↔ English translator. MediaPipe hand tracking, I3D sign recognition, Whisper ASR, ElevenLabs TTS, and a custom SVG avatar. Integrates as a Google Meet bot. Built at YHack 2026.

github_repos.name: dorian
github_repos.description: Visual workflow editor for building and deploying AI agents. Drag-and-drop node canvas with service integrations. React frontend, Node.js backend.

github_repos.name: Neutronics-Simulation
github_repos.description: OpenMC Monte Carlo simulation of fusion reactor breeding blankets. Compares Li₈PbO₆ vs LiPb on tritium breeding ratio, neutron leakage, and radiation damage. Li₈PbO₆ outperforms LiPb by ~20% on TBR.

github_repos.name: Principia-Animatica
github_repos.description: Mathematical animations built with Manim. Lorenz attractor chaos visualization, animated product rule proofs, and more. Programmatic mathematical storytelling.

articles.title: Rhodes Scholaring: Grammar and Power in Decolonial Speech
articles.description: An analysis of how language shapes authority and identity in academic settings, written for the university writing class at Columbia.

articles.title: What's In An Ending? Narrative Refusal in Tell Me How It Ends
articles.description: How Valeria Luiselli refuses narrative closure to resist the extraction and commodification of migrant children's trauma.

articles.title: Starting to Think
articles.description: On figuring out what you actually believe, why you believe it, and whether any of it holds up.

articles.title: Career Thoughts, Part 1
articles.description: On passion, money, prestige, and why all three make poor primary goals for a 130,000-hour question.

projects.title: mcpaudit
projects.description: Static analysis tool for MCP server security. Detects 12 vulnerability classes using Python's ast module. Published on PyPI as mcp-vulnscan.

projects.title: Bridge
projects.description: Real-time ASL ↔ English translator built at YHack 2026. Hand tracking, I3D sign recognition, Whisper ASR, ElevenLabs TTS, custom SVG avatar. First hackathon for both of us.

projects.title: Dorian
projects.description: Visual workflow editor for composing and deploying AI agents. Node-based canvas, service integrations, deploy-ready backend.

projects.title: Neutronics Simulation
projects.description: Monte Carlo simulation of fusion reactor breeding blankets using OpenMC. Li₈PbO₆ outperforms LiPb by ~20% on tritium breeding ratio.

experiments.title: Wikipedia Speed Run!
experiments.description: Navigate from obscure Wikipedia articles to complex topics using only internal links. Race against the clock!

experiments.title: Frequency
experiments.description: Decrypt messages using frequency analysis. A cryptography puzzle game with 10 levels of increasing difficulty.

experiences.title: Laidlaw Scholar
experiences.description: Undergraduate research scholarship for AI safety research. Selected from Columbia for a funded independent research project.

experiences.title: Research Assistant, ARiSE Lab
experiences.description: AI safety and reliability research at the Alignment Research Initiative for Safe and Ethical AI.

experiences.title: Intro Technical Fellowship Facilitator
experiences.description: Facilitate the Columbia AI Alignment Community's introductory technical AI safety fellowship, guiding cohorts through interpretability and alignment fundamentals.

experiences.title: Volunteer Math Teacher
experiences.description: Teach math to elementary school kids in Harlem once a week through a community tutoring program.

experiences.title: Peer Notetaker
experiences.description: Provided lecture notes for students with disabilities through the Barnard Center for Accessibility Resources and Disability Services.

experiences.title: Non-Trivial Fellow
experiences.description: Selected for the Non-Trivial fellowship for students building at the intersection of technology and high-impact problems.
